steps.title: Read slope and intercept from the line
steps.content: The line of best fit goes down from left to right, so the slope is negative (rules out A and C). The $y$-intercept is small and positive — about $1.54$, not $15.4$.

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content:
Slope $\approx -1$ and $y$-intercept $\approx 1.54$ gives $y = -x + 1.54$.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
